payload.answer: I could not remember the article content because fetching https://example.com/missing failed with a 404/network error. I should not invent claims about the article. You can provide the article text, a working URL, or a summary to save.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so there is no reliable source content to attach durable memory to.

details: No durable memory card was created because article content was unavailable.
Preserved user-provided rationale: useful for memory architecture.

repair_options: Provide a summary or key points you want remembered.
Save only a bookmark-style note that the URL was requested for memory architecture, without claiming article content.
